content:
To fix the compilation error, initialize the new `disks` field in `CommonConfig` inside `src/provider/mod.rs`. 

If your provider YAML configs do not yet parse a `disks` field, initialize it to `None`:

```rust
// In src/provider/mod.rs

// Line 137 (GCP block)
common: CommonConfig {
    groups: yaml.group,
    specs: yaml.specs,
    rules: yaml.rules,
    provisioner: yaml.provisioner,
    disks: None, // <-- Add this
},

// Line 164 (DigitalOcean block)
common: CommonConfig {
    groups: yaml.group,
    specs: yaml.specs,
    rules: yaml.rules,
    provisioner: yaml.provisioner,
    disks: None, // <-- Add this
},
```

If you have already updated the GCP and DigitalOcean YAML structs to parse `disks`, pass it directly:

```rust
    disks: yaml.disks,
```
